title: Government Code § 2267.005
text:
Sec. 2267.005. CONFLICT OF INTEREST. An employee of a responsible governmental entity or a person related to the employee within the second degree by consanguinity or affinity, as determined under Chapter 573, may not accept money, a financial benefit, or other consideration from a contracting person that has entered into a comprehensive agreement with the responsible governmental entity.

Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1153 (S.B. 211), Sec. 25, eff. June 14, 2013.
chapter_title: GOVERNMENT CODE CHAPTER 2267. PUBLIC AND PRIVATE FACILITIES AND INFRASTRUCTURE
